name: antigravity-telegram-bridge
description: Connects Antigravity Agent to Telegram for remote chat and control. v0.6.0: Bot starts PAUSED by default, /start to activate, /pause to silence.

telegramBridge.botToken.description: The Bot Token obtained from @BotFather on Telegram.

telegramBridge.userId.description: Your Telegram User ID (to restrict access).

telegramBridge.statusNotifications.description: Send proactive status change notifications (Online/Thinking/Working/Idle/Offline) to Telegram.

telegramBridge.autoStart.description: Auto-start bot in ACTIVE mode when VS Code opens. When false (default), bot starts PAUSED and requires /start on Telegram to activate.
